feature.title: Animation & Interaction Polish — Editorial Browser + Garden Detail

notes: Promoted 2026-05-04 — Afo asked to resume motion polish; reading (a) perceived richness, working on release/1.1.0.
Branch update 2026-05-07 — release/1.1.0 fully merged into main and main is 20+ commits ahead; UI lane closed on main while a parallel agent works elsewhere.
Use browser evidence for animation quality and record proof limits honestly.
status.json is authoritative; Markdown keeps the detailed execution context.

red.evidence: Test 'defers navigate by the close-stagger window after clicking close' asserts navigateSpy is NOT called immediately after click and NOT called at CLOSE_STAGGER_DURATION_MS - 1; would fail under the previous synchronous close handler.

green.evidence: Same test passes after wiring the closing-state machine; vi.advanceTimersByTime(CLOSE_STAGGER_DURATION_MS) triggers navigateSpy with ['/gardens', { viewTransition: true }]. Reduced-motion test confirms the JS path bypasses the stagger and navigates synchronously when matchMedia('(prefers-reduced-motion: reduce)').matches is true. 38/38 Public-route tests still pass; tsc --noEmit clean; format:check clean; lint clean (3 pre-existing warnings unrelated).

tdd.note: proof_limit: visual quality of the reverse stagger, real card→dialog morph with garden image data, reduced-motion end-to-end visual confirmation, and Phase C2/C3 aspect/duration verdicts all require live Brave session — dev client process is online but not serving (parse error in shared bundle from a parallel agent's WIP). qa_pass_1 to capture browser evidence.
No state/API lane is planned; this backlog hub is scoped to public browser animation and interaction polish.
No contract lane is planned; this backlog hub is scoped to public browser UI polish.

history.note: Formalized a loose backlog note so it participates in plan-hub taxonomy and summary grouping without promoting it to active work.

Afo confirmed reading (a) perceived richness and to stay on release/1.1.0. Promoted backlog → active. Added image-lifecycle hypothesis to Phase A diagnosis (ImageWithFallback opacity-0 reset on dialog mount captures grey wrapper bg in the new view-transition snapshot).

Phase B (close choreography) + Phase F (reduced-motion + a11y sweep) shipped on main while a parallel agent works elsewhere. Phase C2 (aspect ratio) + C3 (per-card morph duration) deferred with proof_limit until visual signoff against real garden image data. New unit tests in PublicGardenDialog.test.tsx capture RED+GREEN; visual quality remains a proof_limit for qa_pass_1.

Phase C closing verdict — C2 + C3 explicitly closed as deferred. C3 retest: synthetic harness in storybook iframe could not isolate wildcard-rule freeze risk (control test aborts identically); shipping wildcard blind would risk freezing all view-transitions site-wide. C2: minimal fix (drop sm:aspect-[3/1]) is aesthetic-judgment-heavy without Afo's visual pass — the 3/1 desktop hero may be intentional editorial drama. Verification plan's automated bullet (lint:vocab + format + lint + test + build) all green; visual items remain qa_pass_1 scope.
